// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Logger<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Logger<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.ILogger<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Logger<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<string>, global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<string>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<string>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<string>>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var s0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.TestRequestHandler<string>>();
                var s1 = new global::TestNamespace.LoggingDecorator<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<string>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<string>>(s0);
                var s1_p0 = sp.GetService<global::TestNamespace.ILogger<global::TestNamespace.LoggingDecorator<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<string>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<string>>>>();
                s1.Logger = s1_p0;
                return s1;
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Logger<global::TestNamespace.LoggingDecorator<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<string>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<string>>>, global::TestNamespace.Logger<global::TestNamespace.LoggingDecorator<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<string>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<string>>>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.ILogger<global::TestNamespace.LoggingDecorator<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<string>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<string>>>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Logger<global::TestNamespace.LoggingDecorator<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest<string>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<string>>>>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
